description: Always-loaded policy for the shared knowledge base: retrieve relevant canonical knowledge with kb_search before non-trivial work and cite it, capture worthwhile non-trivial knowledge afterward with the matching capture tool (question/til/blueprint), use capture_memory sparingly for tiny always-true project facts, and treat every capture as a draft pending human review rather than canonical knowledge

files.description: Concise always-loaded rule: retrieve-first via kb_search and cite, capture-when-worthwhile via capture_question/til/blueprint, memory sparingly for always-true facts, drafts are not canonical
